raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California will begin implementing new federal benefit payments of $600 on top of the weekly benefit received by workers.",
    "Californians have filed more unemployment claims in the last four weeks than in all of 2019.",
    "California has processed about 2.3 million unemployment insurance claims in the last four weeks.",
    "The number of claims processed in a week ending April 4, 2020, was 925,450, representing a 2,418% increase over the same week last year.",
    "The EDD paid a total of nearly $684.3 million in unemployment benefits to Californians in need in the last four weeks."
  ]
```
